title: Payment Transactions
subtitle: Manage, search, and control customer payment transactions.

filter.search_placeholder: Search transaction, booking code, customer name or email...

table.empty_desc: No payment transactions matched your current filters.

action.refund_tooltip_staff: Only administrators have permission to refund payments

refund.dialog_desc: You are requesting a refund for this customer transaction. Please verify the details carefully.
refund.warning_desc: This action is irreversible. The funds will be returned to the customer's e-wallet or bank account depending on the gateway used.
refund.vietqr_hint: Scan the QR with your banking app. Confirm the refund only after the transfer succeeds.
refund.transfer_reference_placeholder: Enter the transfer reference after a successful payment
refund.toast_success: Refund request for transaction {{code}} has been successfully executed!
refund.toast_error: An error occurred while executing refund: {{message}}

validation.reason_min: Refund reason must be at least 10 characters
validation.account_name_required: Please enter the account holder name
validation.transfer_reference_min: Transfer reference must be at least 4 characters
validation.transfer_reference_required: Please enter the transfer reference after payment

export.toast_error: An error occurred while exporting transactions: {{message}}

detail.title: Payment Details
detail.subtitle: View payment transaction details and history
detail.not_found_description: This payment does not exist or has been removed from the system.
detail.load_error_description: Payment data is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
detail.not_found: Payment transaction not found or does not exist.
